title: Finn's Backwards Day
synopsis: When Finn wakes up and decides to do everything backwards for fun, his silly antics spread to his friends and create hilarious chaos throughout their day together.

pages.text: Finn woke up on a sunny Tuesday morning. He stretched his arms wide and yawned. Then he had the silliest idea ever! "Today, I will do everything backwards!" he announced to his teddy bear.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes sits upside down on his bed, arms stretched wide with an enormous grin, talking to a teddy bear that's also positioned upside down, bright morning sunlight streaming through colorful curtains
illustration.alt: Finn sitting upside down on his bed with his teddy bear

pages.text: First, Finn put on his clothes backwards. His shirt was inside-out, and his shoes were on the wrong feet. He looked in the mirror and giggled. "Perfect!" he said to his silly reflection.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes wearing an inside-out shirt and mismatched shoes, making an exaggerated funny face at himself in a colorful mirror with his reflection equally distorted and goofy
illustration.alt: Finn looking at his backwards reflection in the mirror

pages.text: At breakfast, Finn tried to eat his cereal with a fork. Milk splashed everywhere! His mom laughed so hard she snorted. "Finn, what are you doing?" she asked, wiping tears from her eyes.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes holding a fork over a bowl of cereal with milk splashing dramatically in all directions, his mom in the background laughing with exaggerated expressions and milk drops frozen in mid-air
illustration.alt: Finn making a mess trying to eat cereal with a fork

pages.text: "It's Backwards Day!" Finn declared proudly. "I'm doing everything the opposite way!" His mom smiled and ruffled his already messy hair. "Well then, have a terrible day at school!" she joked.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes pointing dramatically with one finger raised high, his mom patting his head with both of them grinning widely in bright, bouncy cartoon style with exaggerated happy expressions
illustration.alt: Finn explaining Backwards Day to his smiling mom

pages.text: On his way to school, Finn walked backwards down the sidewalk. Step by step, he moved in reverse. "This is so much fun!" he thought. But then... BONK! He walked right into his friend Maya.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking backwards with arms flailing comically, about to collide with his friend Maya, both characters in exaggerated slapstick poses with motion lines and impact stars around them
illustration.alt: Finn walking backwards and bumping into his friend Maya

pages.text: "!yrroS" said Finn, which was "Sorry!" backwards. Maya giggled and rubbed her arm. "Why are you talking funny, Finn?" she asked. Finn explained his backwards day adventure with great enthusiasm.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes gesturing wildly with his mouth wide open in an exaggerated talking pose, while Maya holds her arm and laughs, speech bubbles with backwards letters floating around them in bright candy colors
illustration.alt: Finn explaining to Maya why he's talking backwards

pages.text: "That sounds hilarious!" Maya exclaimed. "Can I try too?" Soon both friends were walking backwards to school, bumping into mailboxes, trees, and each other. They couldn't stop laughing!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and Maya both walking backwards in bouncy, rubber-hose animation style, comically bouncing off mailboxes and trees with exaggerated impact effects and huge grins on their faces
illustration.alt: Finn and Maya walking backwards and bumping into things

pages.text: At school, their friend Jake saw them. "What are you two doing?" he asked with a puzzled expression. "!yaD sdrawkcaB s'tI" they both shouted together, then burst into giggles at their backwards talking.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and Maya facing Jake with their mouths wide open shouting, Jake scratching his head with an enormously confused expression, all in bright cartoon style with oversized facial features
illustration.alt: Finn and Maya shouting backwards words to confused Jake

pages.text: Jake loved the idea! Soon all three friends were doing everything backwards. They tried to write their names backwards on the chalkboard. Jake wrote "ekaJ" which made everyone in class laugh out loud.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes standing with Maya and Jake at a colorful chalkboard covered in backwards letters, all three children in exaggerated laughing poses with their classmates in the background holding their bellies from laughter
illustration.alt: Three friends writing backwards names on the chalkboard while classmates laugh

pages.text: At recess, they played tag backwards. Instead of running away from the person who was "it," they ran toward them! It was the silliest game of tag ever. Everyone kept getting tagged immediately!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes running directly toward Maya who is "it" with arms outstretched, while Jake and other kids also run toward the tagger in a chaotic, bouncy scene with motion lines and dust clouds
illustration.alt: Children playing backwards tag by running toward the person who is it

pages.text: They tried eating their lunch backwards too. They started with dessert and ended with sandwiches. Their teacher, Mrs. Apple, watched them with amusement. "You three are quite the entertainers today!" she chuckled.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes sitting with Maya and Jake at a lunch table, all holding cookies and fruit while sandwiches sit untouched, Mrs. Apple in the background with an enormously amused expression and hands on her hips
illustration.alt: The three friends eating dessert first while their teacher watches amused

pages.text: By the end of the day, more kids had joined their backwards fun. They said goodbye by saying "!olleH" They walked backwards out of school, waving their hands in reverse. It had been the most wonderfully silly day ever!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes leading a group of children all walking backwards out of a colorful school building, everyone waving backwards with enormous smiles, motion lines showing their reverse movement in bright, bouncy cartoon style
illustration.alt: Finn leading a group of children walking backwards out of school while waving

pages.text: When Finn got home, his mom asked, "How was your terrible day at school?" Finn grinned his biggest grin. "It was absolutely awful!" he said, which in backwards day language meant it was the best day ever!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes at his front door with the most enormous, exaggerated happy grin possible, his mom smiling knowingly in the doorway, both characters in bouncy cartoon style with bright, warm colors surrounding the happy scene
illustration.alt: Finn arriving home with a huge grin telling his mom about his awful day

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: What did Finn decide to do when he woke up?
questions.explanation: Finn decided to have a backwards day and do everything the opposite way!

questions.question: How did Finn try to eat his cereal?
questions.explanation: Finn tried to eat his cereal with a fork instead of a spoon, making a big mess!

questions.question: Who were Finn's friends in the story?
questions.explanation: Finn's friends Maya and Jake joined him for backwards day fun!

questions.question: How did the friends play tag backwards?
choices: They ran toward the person who was it
questions.explanation: In backwards tag, they ran toward the person who was 'it' instead of running away!

questions.question: What did Finn mean when he said his day was 'awful'?
questions.explanation: Since it was backwards day, when Finn said 'awful' he really meant it was wonderful!
